company_location: Karlsruhe, Pforzheim, Berlin, Frankfurt or 100% Remote, Germany
contact_lookup_status: Named recruiter Tabea Ade, direct phone number, and email were verified from the official Ratbacher posting checked on 2026-04-18.
job_title: Product Owner AI (m/w/d) - KI Produkt Manager
availability_override: I would be available to start from 01 July 2026 and would be glad to discuss a suitable transition timeline if needed.
why_company: What caught my attention about this Ratbacher mandate is that the role is not just about maintaining a backlog. It is about shaping the strategy, concept, and market success of a new AI-related product in a software platform environment where business integration, product thinking, and practical AI understanding have to come together.
job_description: Ratbacher GmbH is recruiting a Product Owner AI (m/w/d) for a software company that builds a SaaS, cloud-native, AI-supported platform for connecting systems and orchestrating data intelligently between enterprise systems within and across companies. The role is a full-time permanent position and is open in Karlsruhe, Pforzheim, Berlin, Frankfurt, or 100 percent remote. The successful candidate will be responsible for the strategy, concept, and market success of a new product with AI components. The posting asks for a completed degree in business informatics, informatics, business administration, or a comparable field; at least five years of experience as a Product Owner or Product Manager for a software product, ideally with successful development of a new business field; experience with software platforms especially in business integration either from product or technical perspectives; strong conceptual and analytical capability; practical understanding of AI technologies; and fluent German at least C1 level.
requirements: Completed degree in business informatics, computer science, business administration, or a comparable field
At least five years of responsibility as Product Owner or Product Manager for a software product
Ideally experience helping build a new business field or product line
Experience with software platforms, especially in business integration, from product or technical perspective
Practical understanding of the application and variety of AI technologies
Fluent German at least C1 level
cv_about_override: Product manager focused on AI-enabled and operations-heavy software products, with strength in product strategy, stakeholder alignment, and turning complex platform problems into structured execution.
cv_summary_override: Product professional with experience across B2B marketplaces, regulated onboarding, healthcare workflow digitization, and AI-enabled product operations. Over more than five years in product and business-analysis roles, I have worked across strategy, requirements, stakeholder alignment, rollout, and measurable delivery. Alongside that background, I have been building a stronger AI-oriented profile through Software Engineering studies, automation workflows, and public writing on practical AI adoption. This makes me best suited to product roles where AI needs to become concrete, usable, and commercially meaningful rather than remaining a branding layer.
cover_letter_opening: I wanted to apply for the Product Owner AI (m/w/d) role you are recruiting for because it brings together product strategy, business integration, and applied AI in a software platform environment.
cover_letter_body_one: Across more than five years in product and business-analysis roles, I have worked across strategy, requirements, stakeholder alignment, and rollout in environments where software had to solve real business and workflow problems.
cover_letter_body_two: What makes this mandate especially relevant to me now is the AI angle. Through my Software Engineering studies, my Business Information Systems background, and my hands-on work with AI workflows and automation, I have been moving toward product roles where AI needs to become usable, structured, and commercially meaningful. I can bring strong product discipline, conceptual thinking, and cross-functional execution.
cover_letter_motivation: I am particularly interested in this opportunity because the product appears to sit where SaaS platform thinking, system integration, and applied AI meet.
cover_letter_closing: I would be available to start from 01 July 2026 and would be glad to discuss a suitable transition timeline if needed. I also want to be transparent that the role asks for fluent German at at least C1 level, while my German is still improving and not yet there. I work confidently in English at C1 level with IELTS 7.5. If this role is not the right fit because of the language requirement, I would still be grateful to be considered for another suitable AI- or product-related role through Ratbacher.
